title: Cybernetic System
description: An industrial mod in the style of the "future" that allows you to improve your genes, create implants and become a cyborg.
body:
![CS_text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3333cfe025536d68c13ec310a80c11164fd947d.png)

This modification allows you to use a special system that will give you access to player upgrades, use implants, and allow you to become a cyborg.

Thanks to this mod, the player can mine ore deposits using a drilling rig.
In addition, the player can create a special armor of the CA series, which can be modified for different tasks.


# Cybernetic System - Cyborg
The main thing in this modification is becoming a Cyborg who can use a special Cybernetic system and improve it with modifications and chips.

![CS_Cyborg_menuy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/116a1345e05990a89cf4b21eb13a705397485906.png)

# Cybernetic System - Implants
If the player does not wish to become a cyborg, they can use implants that require DNA glasses to be installed.
![Augm_CS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dacb4452a3c82da250e8b3e29a74e59078c6e5c2.png)
